REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-28-2020. ALAN SHERWOOD, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ROBERT SCHOEN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL IS DENIED. MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-29-2020 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON SEP-28-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. ALAN SHERWOOD, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ROBERT SCHOEN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A 90-DAY CONTINUANCE DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A WITNESS TO TRAVEL. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL WITH A CONTINUANCE FEE OF $60.00 TO BE PAID IN ROOM 103. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT THIS WILL BE THE LAST REQUEST TO CONTINUE TRIAL. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
